data.title: MicroStrategy Shares Show Pre-Market Increase
data.description: According to BlockBeats, shares of MicroStrategy (MSTR) experienced a shift from a decline to an increase in pre-market trading. The current pre-market gain stands at 0.28%.

data.title: U.S. March Unemployment Rate Slightly Higher Than Expected
data.description: According to Odaily, the unemployment rate in the United States for March stood at 4.2%, slightly above the anticipated 4.1%. Meanwhile, the labor force participation rate for the same month was recorded at 62.5%, surpassing both the expected 62.4% and the previous value of 62.40%.

data.title: U.S. non-farm payrolls in March were 228,000, compared with expectations of 135,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The seasonally adjusted non-farm payrolls in the United States in March were 228,000, which was expected to be 135,000. The previous value was revised from 151,000 to 117,000. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. unemployment rate in March was 4.2%, expected to be 4.1%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The U.S. unemployment rate in March was 4.2%, expected to be 4.1%.
The U.S. employment participation rate in March was 62.5%, expected to be 62.4%, and the previous value was 62.40%. (Jinshi)

data.title: Non-farm payrolls were higher than expected, and the US dollar index rose 20 points in the short term
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The seasonally adjusted non-farm payrolls in the United States in March were 228,000, an increase higher than the market expectation of 135,000. The US dollar index rose 20 points in the short term and is now at 101.87. US stock index futures fell further after the release of the March non-farm payrolls data. (Jinshi)

data.title: Digital asset platform CoinList announces return to the U.S. market
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Digital asset platform CoinList announced that it has returned to the US market and started token sales. It is reported that it will first launch a public token sales product for qualified investors to support US "compliant" token sales and allow US investors to participate. (Crowdfundinsider)

data.title: Before the release of the non-farm payrolls, the probability that the Federal Reserve will keep interest rates unchanged in May is 60.1%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Before the release of the non-agricultural data, according to CME's "Fed Watch", the probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged in May is 60.1%, and the probability of a 25 basis point rate cut is 39.9%. The probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged by June is 0, the probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut is 53.2%, and the probability of a cumulative 50 basis point rate cut is 42.2%. (Jinshi)

data.title: Justin Sun announces $50 million bounty program for FDT "fraud" incident, plans to launch a dedicated portal
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Sun Yuchen posted on X platform that a $50 million bounty program (equivalent to about 10% of its liquidity support or stolen TUSD reserves) will be used to recover TUSD reserves misappropriated by bad actors including First Digital Trust (FDT). The program includes:
Any insider or whistleblower who provides important clues to help recover funds will be rewarded.
Full transparency: A dedicated portal (#web3bounty.io) will be launched soon and provide real-time updates.
Independent verification: All claims will be strictly evaluated before rewards are issued.

data.title: BNB Chain announces 16 selected projects for MVB Season 9
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the community-driven blockchain ecosystem BNB Chain announced the 16 early projects selected for the 9th season of the Most Valuable Builder (MVB) Accelerator Program. The 4-week accelerator program is jointly operated by BNB Chain, YZi Labs and CMC Labs: 
BitGPT is a decentralized network for AI agents. 
Datai Network is the data layer that supports on-chain AI, which converts raw blockchain data into structured, AI-usable intelligence. 
Echopy is the leading AI portfolio optimizer on BNB chain that analyzes market trends and data
Eurexa AI is the first on-chain tokenization platform for robotics
Everlyn is building one of the fastest video generators for web3
JoJoWorld is a decentralized AI spatial 3D data platform
Super Protocol is a collaborative confidential AI marketplace
TermiX is an AI-powered Web3 operating system that provides seamless integration of AI agents and zero-code agent creation

BitFi is the CeDeFi destination to maximize the value of your BTC holdings with a native real-yield BTC solution.
LIKWID is the first fully permissionless, oracle-free margin trading protocol.
XPIN is an AI-powered consumer DeFi platform that combines decentralized wireless technology with user-centric innovation.
Stadium Science is a prediction market platform designed to accelerate scientific research.
Citadel Labs is a startup platform that provides funding for multiple deep tech projects.

Oneverse is Southeast Asia's premier Web2 gaming marketplace, bridging traditional gamers and Web3.
TCOM Global is a global decentralized IP governance protocol that revolutionizes content creation through the fusion of AI and Web3.

Pieverse is a decentralized time economy layer that redefines human attention and engagement aggregation.

data.title: China’s Retaliatory Tariffs Shake Global Markets, Bitcoin Dips To $82K
data.description:
S. with a 34% tariff, sending shockwaves through Wall Street and crypto. Bitcoin, which had recently shown signs of recovery, climbing above $84K, took a hit as Nasdaq futures plunged further
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/chinas-retaliatory-tariffs-shake-global-markets-bitcoin-dips-to-82k/
